title: Studio Clean Out Boxes
excerpt: It’s that time again for Studio Clean Out Boxes ! Get over $100 worth of assorted (mostly) Amy Tangerine products! These can include stickers, washi tape, die cuts, traveler’s notebooks, 12x12 patterned paper, stamps and much more from some of…
body:
It’s that time again for Studio Clean Out Boxes! Get over $100 worth of assorted (mostly) Amy Tangerine products! 

   

These can include stickers, washi tape, die cuts, traveler’s notebooks, 12x12 patterned paper, stamps and much more from some of my most-loved collections over the years. Many of these items have been completely sold out everywhere else! You may also get a few pieces from some of my all-time favorite brands such as Tombow and Pipsticks.

If you’re one of the first 30 people to purchase a Studio Clean Out Box, you’ll also receive some extra special goodies - an exclusive Amy Tangerine tape runner, travel scissors and an assortment of OOLY pens! 

There are a very limited number of boxes available and the last time I did a studio clean out, we sold out quickly! 

Don’t miss this chance to get some of your favorite Amy Tangerine products for a great deal! 

Shop Now

Fresh Takes on Traveler’s Notebook Online Course

Enrollment is open again for Fresh Takes on Traveler’s Notebooks - my first-ever online traveler’s notebook course! If you missed the first launch, now is your chance to sign up for this self-paced online course all about my favorite traveler’s notebook techniques! Click here for more info and to sign up!
